methods.int available():
Returns an estimate of the number of bytes that can be read (or
 skipped over) from this input stream without blocking by the next
 invocation of a method for this input stream.
methods.void close():
Closes this input stream and releases any system resources associated
 with the stream.
methods.void mark(int\u00a0readlimit): Marks the current position in this input stream.
methods.boolean markSupported(): Tests if this input stream supports themarkandresetmethods.
methods.int read(): Reads the next byte of data from the input stream.
methods.int read(byte[]\u00a0b):
Reads some number of bytes from the input stream and stores them into
 the buffer arrayb.
methods.int read(byte[]\u00a0b,\n int\u00a0of:
Reads up tolenbytes of data from the input stream into
 an array of bytes.
methods.void reset(): Repositions this stream to the position at the time themarkmethod was last called on this input stream.
methods.long skip(long\u00a0n):
Skips over and discardsnbytes of data from this input
 stream.
